user.title: AI Playlist Setup
user.description: Select the AI Task entity to use for generating playlists.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure AI Playlist
reconfigure.description: Change the AI Task entity used for generating playlists.

error.no_ai_entity: Please select an AI Task entity.

data.name: Playlist name
data.refill_threshold: Refill when fewer than N tracks remain

data.name: Playlist name
data.refill_threshold: Refill when fewer than N tracks remain

import_playlists.title: Import Playlists
import_playlists.description: Paste YAML with playlist definitions. Each entry needs 'name' and 'prompt'. Optional: tags (list), track_count, history_depth, refill_threshold, exclude_live.

add_collection.title: Add Collection
add_collection.description: Create a select entity backed by a tag query. Tags: {tag_hint}

edit_system_prompt.title: Edit System Prompt
edit_system_prompt.description: Customize the instructions sent to the AI when generating tracks. The default prompt requests JSON ([{"artist": "...", "title": "...", "album": "..."}]). If the AI returns plain text, the parser falls back to one track per line as 'Artist - Title' or 'Artist - Title | Album'.

error.slug_collision: This name conflicts with an existing playlist after slugification (different punctuation/spacing produces the same internal slug). Pick a more distinct name.

abort.no_playlists: No playlists configured yet. Add a playlist first.
abort.import_empty: No playlists imported. Check that the YAML is a list of entries with 'name' and 'prompt' fields; see Home Assistant logs for parse errors.
